type.name: type
type.description: the type of recurring payment; allowed values: A, O, M

frequency.description: Frequency of the recurrency; value must fulfill regex: [1-9][0-9]{0,2}[DWMY])

totalLimitAmount.description: Maximum total amount that will be charged through the process

limitAmount.description: Maximum amount that will be charged in a single payment

totalLimitCount.description: Number of payments that will be issued in the whole process

availableBanks.description: Parameter to control the verification of whether the bank supports recursion. If set to false, it is not checked if the bank supports recursion.
